title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between three and six words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

questions.firstSentence: The plumber is repairing the leak as we speak.
‘You should stop smoking,’ the doctor said to him.
questions.explanation: Tests reporting verb + object + infinitive with phrasal verb.

questions.firstSentence: I regret not taking that job offer in Paris.
questions.explanation: Tests 'wish' + past perfect for past regrets.
questions.secondSentence: I (1) _________ that job offer in Paris.

questions.firstSentence: It is possible that they missed the last bus.
questions.explanation: Tests modal perfect for past possibility.

questions.firstSentence: I didn't realize my mistake until I checked the figures again.
questions.secondSentence: Only when I checked the figures again (1) _________ my mistake.

questions.firstSentence: The test was so easy that everyone passed.
